testcase.name: User logs in with macro

error.message: I enter password "secret123" -- button missing [via macro 'login as alice' called at feature line 3, step 3/5: I enter password "secret123"]

testcase.system-out: Given login as alice + [failed] (0.000s) + [login as alice 1/5] Given I visit the login page [passed] (0.001s) + [login as alice 2/5] When I enter username "alice" [passed] (0.002s) + [login as alice 3/5] And I enter password "secret123" [failed] (0.003s) + [login as alice 4/5] Then I click the login button [skipped] (0.004s) + [login as alice 5/5] Then I should see the welcome message [skipped] (0.005s) Then I should see the dashboard [skipped] (0.006s)
